title: Baked Apples
description: A tiny mod that adds BoTW-inspired Baked Apples!
body:
![Minecraft Baked Apples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac55ab92a72aa0e680c49ac01ae21644c4e3a42a.png)
# Baked Apples:
Baked Apples is a tiny mod that implements the ability to cook Apples, like The Legand of Zelda BoTW and ToTK. Baked Apples have higher Nutritional value than uncooked Apples, with them giving 3.5 hunger points instead of 2, and have higher saturation. 
# Github:
Baked Apples is open source! Check out the [Github page here!](https://github.com/BreadOfish/BakedApplesMc/tree/main)
# Items:
- Baked Apples:
More nutritous version of an apple, aqquired by cooking an apple by either cooking it in a Furnace, Smoker, or campfire. Cooking it in a Smoker is slightly faster than a Furnace or Smoker.
  
- Burnt Apples:
Overall worse version of the Baked Apple. Made by baking an already baked Apple in a campfire, Furnace, or Smoker. Somehow, eating this will lose three hunger points instead of restoring hunger points. The only upside is it gives high amounts of XP when smelting when compared to other foods.
# Recipies:
Cooked Apples

<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Recipe for Baked Apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c326cbac78b735da89909225dd8c16b6f115aff.png)

</details>

<summary>Spoiler</summary>

</details>
